objective: Plan federated room admission, packetized participation and result references, explicit ordering and conflict policy, recovery, and portable exit without peer truth mutation.
falsifiable_claim: Hosted and federated modes declare distinct ordering, merge, conflict, adjudication, and failover rules; neither peer mutates the other's truth and disconnect preserves local completeness.
exit_criteria: Hosted and federated modes declare ordering, merge, conflict, adjudication, and failover and neither peer mutates the other's truth.
Disconnect or decline preserves local completeness and portable exit verifies without host trust.
Retained evidence log contains exactly one literal M12_FEDERATED_ADMISSION_PORTABLE_EXIT_AND_BINDINGS_EXIT=0; process exit status alone is insufficient.
adversarial_or_fault_proof: Cross-mutate hosted/federated ordering, merge, conflict, adjudication, failover, participant, frontier, result, challenge, contribution, dispute, idempotency, recovery, and export roots.
remaining_nonclaims: No foreign physical-control stream, economic value, network effect, or M13 claim.
Federated admission creates no shared runtime, database, administrator, authority, or stage closure.
source_provenance: Plan-level proposal derived from docs/architecture/_meta/work-items/m0-m14-plan-gap-audit.md at origin/master 69592149186cb29383a397ad0aa3ad6f5ab4ab7b; status transaction 2026-07-22.
